create_dimension.ponder.tag.portal.descr: A dimensional gateway powered by Create’s engineering trains and players can travel through it just like a Nether Portal.
create_dimension.ponder.train_portal.hea: Creating and Lighting a Steamwork realm Portal
create_dimension.ponder.train_portal.tex: Build a 2x3 frame using Train Casings
ignite it with the Steamworks Realm Igniter to open the portal.

§7Trains can pass through the portal just like a Nether Portal.
Simply place tracks directly in front of the portal to connect your rails across dimensions!
tooltip.create_dimension.steamworks_real:
Obtain the Igniter from an Andesite Worker Villager to ignite the portal.
§7The Igniter is available at Level 1.
§6To assign the Andesite Worker profession, place a Create Basin in front of an unemployed villager.
